title: Ledger Record Base
description: Fields common to every ledger record, whether a per-segment fragment (ledger-fragment.schema.json) or a materialized entry inside ledger.json (ledger.schema.json). Deliberately declares NO `status` property -- each composing schema layers its own `status` enum on top so the wider ledger.schema.json enum (which adds `stale`) never conflicts with the narrower fragment enum (which never writes `stale` to disk).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp, always regenerated on every write -- the ONLY unconditional requirement.

rounds.description: Bare integer -- never a {translate,review,fix} object. Every branch of reviewFixLoop() returns a bare int.

n_blocks.description: Populated by ledger_update.py itself by reading segpack_{seg}.json's blocks[] length -- never supplied by the calling agent's payload.

n_footnotes.description: Populated by ledger_update.py itself by reading segpack_{seg}.json's footnotes[] length -- never supplied by the calling agent's payload.

n_verses.description: Populated by ledger_update.py itself by reading segpack_{seg}.json's verses[] length -- never supplied by the calling agent's payload.

reviewed_draft_sha1.description: sha1 of segments/{seg}.draft.json's content, populated by ledger_update.py itself at the moment of convergence -- never supplied by the calling agent.
